memoryArtifacts.description: Sir John Arundell IV, born at Treleigh, in the parish of St Ervan, Cornwall in about 1336 was an English Knight and held large amounts of land in Devon and Cornwall. He died on 5 November 1376, drowne …

zh.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne於1336年出生在英國可瓦爾特雷利時，他的父親John Arundell III27歲，母親Elizabeth Carminow22歲。他於大約1367年與Joan Luscote在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1336年住在英國可瓦爾。他去世於1376年5月之前，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑。

zh-hans.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne于1336年出生在英国可瓦爾特雷利时，他的父亲John Arundell III27岁，母亲Elizabeth Carminow22岁。他于大约1367年与Joan Luscote在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1336年住在英国可瓦爾。他去世于1376年5月之前，埋葬在英国可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne was born in 1336, in Treleigh, Cornwall, England, his father, John Arundell III, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Carminow, was 22. He married Joan Luscote about 1367, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Cornwall, England in 1336. He died before May 1376, and was buried in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne est né en 1336, à Treleigh, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Arundell III, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Carminow, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Luscote environ 1367, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Cornouailles, Angleterre en 1336. Il est décédé avant mai 1376, et a été enterré à St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne 1336 in Treleigh, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Arundell III 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Carminow 22. Er hat um 1367 in Cornwall, England Joan Luscote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1336 hat er in Cornwall, England gelebt. Er starb vor Mai 1376 und wurde in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne è nato il nel 1336 nel Treleigh, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, John Arundell III, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Carminow, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Luscote circa 1367, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Vissuto a Cornwall, England nel 1336. Morì prima del maggio 1376, e fu sepolto a St Columb Major, Cornwall, England.

ja.Treleigh, St Ervan, Cornwall: イギリスコルンワルトレレイグ
ja.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャー
ja.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルランハーン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherneが1336年にイギリスコルンワルトレレイグで生まれた時，父John Arundell IIIは27歳，母Elizabeth Carminowは22歳であった。約1367年にイギリスコルンワルでJoan Luscoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1336年にはイギリスコルンワルに住んでいた。彼は1376年5月以前に死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne(이)가 1336년 영국 코른월 트렐리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Arundell III(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Carminow(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1367년 영국 코른월에서 Joan Luscote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1336년도에 영국 코른월에서 살았다. 그는 1376년 5월 이전 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne nasceu em 1336, em Treleigh, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Arundell III, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Carminow, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Luscote aproximadamente 1367, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele viveu em Cornwall, Inglaterra em 1336. Ele faleceu antes maio de 1376, e foi sepultado em St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne родился в 1336 г. в местности трелиг, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени John Arundell III было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Carminow, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Luscote около 1367 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности корнвалл, Англия в 1336 году. Он умер перед май 1376 г. и был похоронен в местности ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия.

sm.1336 to 1376: mai le 1336 e o'o I le 1376

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne nació en 1336, en Treleigh, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Arundell III, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Carminow, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Luscote aproximadamente 1367, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Vivió en Cornwall, Inglaterra en 1336. Murió antes de mayo de 1376, y fue sepultado en St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
